3020.issue: [E3020] "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses node.js 20 which is below the minimum required version 22. Please update to node.js 24.

3022.issue: [E3022] "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" uses node.js 20 which is below the minimum required version 24. Please update to node.js 24.

3032.issue: [W3032] Release 1.4.2 from [io-package.json](https://github.com/Refoss/ioBroker.refoss/blob/master/io-package.json)/package.json has not yet been tagged. Tagging releases is required.

5004.issue: [S5004] Plain setInterval() found in source files (lib/protocol/udp4.js). Please use this.setInterval() or adapter.setInterval() instead.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (lib/protocol/base.js, lib/protocol/udp4.js). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5043.issue: [S5043] Package "dgram" is a built-in Node.js module. Please use "node:dgram" instead.

8005.issue: [S8005] No GitHub release found. Please use GitHub releases for easier identification of the current release and consider using "@iobroker/action-deploy".

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.
